interaction_log.prompt: What assumptions does the PLTM paper rely on? List main modelling assumptions (e.g. tree, Gaussian, singular parentage).
interaction_log.response_summary: Used for reading comprehension: the assistant listed tree structure, discrete latents, conditional Gaussian pouches, and singular parentage. I matched these to Section 2 and my paper_understanding notes and wrote the three assumptions in the notebook myself.
interaction_log.student_modification: No code. I chose which three assumptions to highlight and wrote the explanations and violation examples myself.

interaction_log.prompt: Give one example of a violation of the singular parentage assumption in a latent tree model.
interaction_log.response_summary: Used for reading comprehension: example of one observed variable depending on two latents. I used this idea to phrase my own violation example in Task 1.2.
interaction_log.student_modification: I adapted the example to our two-pouch setting and wrote the final text myself.

top_5_prompts: What assumptions does the PLTM paper rely on? List main modelling assumptions (e.g. tree, Gaussian, singular parentage).
Give one example of a violation of the singular parentage assumption in a latent tree model.

student_verification.declaration: I used the LLM to clarify the paper's assumptions and one violation example. The choice of which assumptions to list and how to explain them (and their violations) is my own. I verified all content against the paper and take responsibility for the submission.
